title: Surgeon

rationales.taskAutomation: The core of the job is manual operative skill under direct liability; only pre/post-op documentation and standard order sets carry a digital share.
rationales.toolMaturity: Surgical robotics and AI-assisted planning tools are improving but remain assistive, not autonomous, in actual operating rooms.
rationales.adoption: Robotic-assisted surgery and AI planning tools are adopted mainly at larger academic and tertiary care centers.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can draft operative notes and pre-op checklists, but the operation itself stays entirely surgeon-led.

tasksAtRisk: Standard pre-op order sets and checklists
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 29-1249 (Surgeons, All Other), p25-p75 rounded, extended toward market postings for high-demand specialties
insight: AI assists with pre-op planning and drafts the paperwork around a case, but the operation itself is manual, liability-bearing work no model performs. Surgical robotics extend a surgeon's hands; they don't replace the surgeon.
